message:
chore(raptorq): refresh baseline bench profile to 2026-02-15 seed-424242 corpus

Update all benchmark numbers, budget thresholds, and artifact paths
from the previous 2026-02-14 run to the refreshed 2026-02-15 corpus
(perf_20260215_222548) on git SHA 22d2e6e.

Key changes in the structured JSON artifact and markdown doc:
- Encode median: 123.5us -> 289.0us (different remote worker load)
- Decode source: 18.5us -> 21.2us
- Decode repair: 76.8us -> 97.9us
- GF256 addmul: 698ns -> 2004ns (benchmark renamed with
  deterministic seed parameters in name)
- Solver Markowitz: 606.5us -> 799.5us
- Pipeline 64K throughput: 11.56 MiB/s -> 8.83 MiB/s
- Budget warning/fail thresholds recalculated proportionally

Document updates:
- Added closure evidence update for bd-3v1cs checklist items 1-5
- Updated prerequisite status: calibration refresh now complete
- Phase note updated to reflect post-prerequisite calibration pass
- Reproducibility note updated with remote worker variance observation
  (quick-run ranges shift; use seeded full-corpus packet as anchor)
- Toolchain version updated in JSON artifact

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+Closure evidence update (`2026-02-16`):
+
+- Checklist items 1-3 are satisfied by the refreshed seed-`424242` corpus packet:
+  - `target/perf-results/perf_20260215_222548/report.json`
+  - `target/perf-results/perf_20260215_222548/artifacts/baseline_current.json`
+  - `target/perf-results/perf_20260215_222548/logs/phase0_baseline_20260215_222548.log`
+- Item 4 remains mapped to deterministic envelope policy in this document (`fast`/`full`/`forensics`) with observed full-profile wall time bounded by the `<= 30 minute` target.
+- Item 5 remains represented by the deterministic repro command surfaces captured in the quickstart/profile sections and the machine-readable packet.
+
